action.reasoning: Observation: Starting iteration 0 with empty workspace. Need to establish a working training+prediction pipeline as quickly as possible and submit an eval to measure iteration time. Analysis: CLIP ViT-B/16 is pre-cached, smaller (150M params), and fast enough for a 2-epoch baseline. Using DDP across 4 GPUs is required. Decision: Write model.py (CLIP vision backbone + linear head), train.py (DDP, AMP, class-weighted CE, restricted macro-F1 validation), and predict.py (standard eval contract). Run 2 epochs, test predict.py locally with a dummy test split from val.txt, then submit eval.
action.command: torchrun --nproc_per_node=4 --nnodes=1 train.py --epochs 2 --batch_size 64 --lr 1e-4 --output_dir checkpoints && rm -rf /tmp/test_data && mkdir -p /tmp/test_data && awk '{print $1}' /data/val.txt | head -n 100 > /tmp/test_data/test.txt && ln -s /data/images /tmp/test_data/images && python predict.py --data_path /tmp/test_data --checkpoint checkpoints/best.pt --output /tmp/preds.json && echo 'Predict test passed'
